title: Image Requests
wikitext:
[]: Image Requests [Spoilers]             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Mon Sep 14, 2009 10:50 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 15, 2009 2:22 pm You looking for screenshots from the movie?

[]:             Quote Post by R-U-4-Zeruel » Tue Sep 15, 2009 6:10 pm I would like to see a final concept design of tunneliel bceause I want to know if that yellow and black *bumble bee thing* part of the angel or some human made disection tools because quality on the cam rip doesn't really justify my curiosity

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Thu Sep 17, 2009 1:38 am Dont think it's possible to get any of those since the only thing that's out is the camrip and that doesnt have that great of quality.You might be waiting for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Thu Sep 17, 2009 3:12 pm Ornette wrote: You looking for screenshots from the movie?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 17, 2009 4:35 pm Since it hasn't been released in any kind of digital media, you won't find any screenshots. The best you can do is the trailers or preview, which don't show all that much. You can find those here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6443 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6649 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6855 And some images from camrip here http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7073 You can always use the Threads link at the nav bar to find these.

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Thu Sep 17, 2009 4:39 pm Ornette wrote: Since it hasn't been released in any kind of digital media.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 17, 2009 4:50 pm UltraBlackPilot wrote: Ornette wrote: Since it hasn't been released in any kind of digital media.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Sep 17, 2009 5:56 pm Uh since this is a request thread it wouldn't be wrong for me to ask if anybody's got a better quality shot from the Kaji /Shinji coffee scene, would it?

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Thu Sep 17, 2009 7:03 pm Ornette wrote: UltraBlackPilot wrote: Ornette wrote: Since it hasn't been released in any kind of digital media.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Sep 17, 2009 7:15 pm Nagoya is in Japan. Some people flew to see it in theaters over in Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Sep 17, 2009 8:16 pm and those people are lucky indeed to have the time money and oppurtunity to do such a thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 17, 2009 9:13 pm TOPIC or lock.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Fri Sep 18, 2009 5:15 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Sep 19, 2009 12:41 am ^Source? Are those scans from some movie pamphlet?

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Sat Sep 19, 2009 6:27 am Eva4Dummies wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sat Sep 19, 2009 7:59 pm Eva4Dummies wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Sat Sep 19, 2009 8:44 pm what Eva is that top one?

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Sep 19, 2009 8:51 pm Looking kinda Clamp there Kaworu In the end does nobody have Kaji/Shin screencaps?
